subject: refactor(theme): migrate buttons to DaisyUI component classes
body:
Replace custom .btn definitions with DaisyUI's themed btn system.
Header actions use btn-ghost btn-sm for subtle toolbar appearance.
Primary action (New Item) uses btn-primary btn-sm. Danger buttons
migrated from custom btn-danger to DaisyUI's btn-error btn-outline.

Tags: theme, daisyui, buttons, migration
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: theme-dark-mode
Semver: minor
